# Security Policy — thelounge-plugin-webcal

## Reporting a vulnerability

Do **not** open a public issue.

Email: security@dapla.net
Subject: `[SECURITY] thelounge-plugin-webcal — <brief description>`

We acknowledge within 72 hours and aim to patch within 14 days
for confirmed critical/high severity findings.

## Supply chain

This repo ships SLSA Level 3 provenance attestations.
Verify any release artifact with:

```sh
slsa-verifier verify-artifact <artifact> \
--provenance-path <artifact>.intoto.jsonl \
--source-uri github.com/denzuko/thelounge-plugin-webcal
```

## CVE scanning

Every CI run scans the CycloneDX SBOM with `osv-scanner`.
Critical/High CVEs block merge.
